description: Monitoring dashboard for Bitcoin Core Fullnode & Hashi Node.

panels.description: Number of connected Bitcoin P2P peers. A value of 0 means no peers are connected; check trusted peer configuration and network reachability.
panels.title: ❗Kyoto ₿ Peers❗

panels.description: Indicates whether Hashi is currently reconfiguring the MPC committee. If it remains active for more than 10 minutes, check DKG/rotation logs for errors.
panels.title: ❗Reconfig in Progress❗

panels.description: Percentage of Kyoto Bitcoin light client synchronization progress. 100% indicates the Kyoto light client is fully synced.
panels.title: ❗ Kyoto Sync❗

panels.description: Indicates whether Guardian is enabled and reachable.
panels.title: ❗Guardian Enabled | Online❗

panels.description: Indicates whether the Kyoto Bitcoin light client is synced. If unsynced for more than 5 minutes, check Bitcoin RPC and P2P connectivity.
panels.title: ❗ Kyoto Synced❗

panels.description: This node’s effective weight in the current MPC committee after committee weights are compressed into MPC shares.
panels.title: MPC Reduced Weight

panels.description: Total number of MPC signing failures since the node process started. Any increase may indicate MPC protocol issues and should be investigated in the logs.
panels.title: ❗MPC Sign Failures❗

panels.description: Number of presignatures currently available in the local MPC signing pool. A value of 0 means the node cannot sign. Check reconfig status and MPC logs.
panels.title: ❗Presigs Left❗

panels.description: Indicates whether Hashi is currently reconfiguring the MPC committee. If it remains active for more than 10 minutes, check DKG/rotation logs for errors.
panels.title: Reconfig Status History

panels.description: Indicates whether Guardian integration is enabled and reachable.
panels.title: Enabled | Online

panels.description: Shows whether the local Guardian limiter has been initialized from the Guardian state. 1 means initialized; 0 means not initialized.
panels.title: Guardian Limiter Initialized

panels.description: Indicates whether the local Guardian limiter has lost synchronization with the Guardian. 0 means in sync; 1 means drift detected and requires investigation or restart.
panels.title: Guardian  Limiter Synced

panels.description: Average number of Guardian bootstrap attempts. A sustained non-zero rate may indicate repeated bootstrap retries or difficulty retrieving Guardian information.
panels.title: Guardian Bootstrap Attempts Rate

panels.description: ercentage of outbound Guardian RPC calls completed successfully over the last 5 minutes. 100% means all calls succeeded.
panels.title: Guardian RPC Success Ratio

panels.description: Current withdrawal capacity available in the local Guardian limiter bucket.
panels.title: Guardian Available Cap

panels.description: Maximum withdrawal capacity of the local Guardian limiter bucket, as configured by the Guardian.
panels.title: Guardian Max Cap

panels.description: Portion of the Guardian limiter’s maximum Bitcoin withdrawal capacity currently available. 100% means fully available; 0% means no capacity remains
panels.title: Guardian Cap Available
Hashi Node [MPC Protocol Durations for $__range / 24h Fallback]

title: Hashi Node & Bitcoin Core Fullnode
